name: Caitlyn
tip: Stay behind minions, dodge traps, don't fight at levels 1–2. Farm safely, outscale her late.

name: Draven
tip: Respect level 2 all-in. Don't fight at level 1–3. Farm safely until 6, then look for stealth kill.

name: Jinx
tip: Short range early — punish aggressively pre-6. She outscales you late so get kills now.

name: Miss Fortune
tip: She double-ups for poke. Don't stand behind minions. All-in when her Q is on cooldown.

name: Jhin
tip: Jhin 4th shot slows. Stealth away from traps. He has no mobility — dive him after his ult.

name: Ezreal
tip: Ezreal can poke with Q and escape with E. He can't trade well — force extended fights.

name: Tristana
tip: Tristana all-in at level 6 is strong. Don't let her stack bomb on you. Farm and stealth engage on her.

name: Vayne
tip: Vayne is weak early. Abuse her range disadvantage pre-6. She outscales hard — get early kills.

name: Kog'Maw
tip: Extremely short range early. Punish constantly. His W shreds your stealth window late — end early.

name: Senna
tip: Senna heals and pokes. Don't trade into her Q. All-in when she misses root.

name: Sivir
tip: Sivir spells are on skillshots. Bait her spellshield then engage. She has no mobility.

name: Lucian
tip: Strong early burst with passive. Don't trade short. Farm to core items, outscale him.

name: Kai'Sa
tip: Kai'Sa can R onto you from stealth. Ward well. She's weak early — abuse her pre-6.

name: Samira
tip: Samira blocks projectiles with W. Poke her when W is on cooldown. Don't let her combo you.

name: Xayah
tip: Xayah is untargetable during R. Don't waste your spray into her ult. Time your engage.

name: Aphelios
tip: Aphelios depends heavily on which gun he has. Watch for red/white (slow/execute). Farm to stealth engage.

name: Ashe
tip: Ashe slows constantly. She has no mobility. Her ult stuns — stealth away when she ults from range.

name: Varus
tip: Varus Q poke is long range. Dodge or take poke trades. Stealth dive when he has no ult.

name: Nilah
tip: Nilah is a melee ADC with hard engage. Keep distance. She amplifies heals on allies — check her support.

name: Twitch
tip: Mirror matchup — both stealth. Track each other's Q timers. First to get items wins.

name: Thresh
tip: Dodge Thresh hook — it's his only engage. Stealth behind minions. Punish when hook is on CD.

name: Blitzcrank
tip: Blitz hook is instant death if caught. Stand behind minions always. All-in after he hooks your support.

name: Leona
tip: Hard all-in at level 2. Don't fight pre-6. Farm and wait for ganks. Her CC chain is brutal.

name: Nautilus
tip: Root on hit + Q hook. He will always CC you if he reaches you. Keep distance, stealth approach.

name: Morgana
tip: 3s bind is death for you. Dodge it at all costs. Her black shield blocks your support's CC.

name: Lulu
tip: Enemy Lulu polymorph counters your stealth engage. Engage when poly is on cooldown.

name: Soraka
tip: Get Executioner's Calling early. Her heal is almost infinite without grievous wounds.

name: Yuumi
tip: Get Executioner's Calling early. Yuumi is untargetable while attached — target their ADC first.

name: Janna
tip: Janna knocks up and shields. Stealth engage when tornado is on cooldown.

name: Nami
tip: Nami bubble is hard to hit — dodge it. All-in between her E procs.

name: Karma
tip: Karma RQ poke is strong. Farm under tower if needed. She's weak without R available.

name: Zyra
tip: Zyra roots are long range. Dodge them. Stealth past her plants — plants can't reveal you.

name: Brand
tip: Brand passive stacks hurt. Don't fight in AoE. Stealth dive him — he's squishy.

name: Pyke
tip: Pyke will stealth and hook you. Ward his flanks. Both in stealth — track his Q indicators.

name: Rakan
tip: Rakan's E into W is a fast engage. Stay spread from your support. Punish him out of W range.

name: Senna
tip: Get Executioner's Calling. Senna heals and pokes. Her root is easy to dodge — all-in after.

name: Xerath
tip: Long-range poke. Farm safely. All-in when Xerath has no ult — he has no escape.

name: Alistar
tip: Alistar headbutt+pulverize combo is undodgeable in melee range. Keep distance until 6.

name: Bard
tip: Bard roams often. Track him on minimap. His ult freezes everyone including you — dodge it.
